reference: Hi, my name is April. I have had the Mirena intrauterine device for three years, and I had my period last week, which stopped about four days ago. I was fine until yesterday when I went to use the restroom and there was a string of blood in the toilet, but I didn't see any string or anything else. Since then, I have been experiencing menstrual cramps like crazy, but no bleeding. Do you know what that could be?
text: Hi, my name is April. I have had the Mirena intrauterine device for three years and I had my period last week, which stopped about four days ago. I was fine until yesterday when I went to use the restroom and there was a stream of blood in the toilet, but I didn't see any stream or anything else. Since then, I have been experiencing menstrual cramps like crazy, but no bleeding. Do you know what that could be?
